summary: order hydrate's pre-flight quota check now probes the SQLite cache per cert (facts and images independently) so already-cached certs aren't counted as live calls.
reason: Previously `cost = len(certs)` (or `len(certs)*2` with images) was passed straight to the quota gate. A 300-cert order with 200 already cached would refuse with quota=110 (needs 100 live, has 110). Greptile P1 finding on PR #630 (review 2). Mirrors the pattern from coin pop-curve's pop-curve-cache-probe and coin batch's emitForecast.
